description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Boneti Bizcochuelo sabor chocolate, featuring a light blue background with scattered images of chocolate cake slices on the front. The top of the box is dark brown with the Boneti logo in white, and the front panel prominently displays the product name and chocolate imagery. The back of the box provides detailed preparation instructions, ingredient lists, and additional product information, including a large image of a chocolate cake. The left side panel contains nutritional information and a barcode, while the right side panel lists ingredients and preparation steps for a chocolate sauce. The box is sealed and designed for retail sale, with clear branding and product visuals.
description: A rectangular Boneti Bizcochuelo chocolate cake mix box with a light blue front, chocolate cake slice graphics, and detailed preparation and nutritional information on the sides and back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Boneti logo, chocolate cake slice graphics, and the product name on a light blue background.
description_view_1: The left side displays a nutritional information panel, ingredients list, and a barcode at the bottom.
description_view_2: The back view features preparation instructions, a large chocolate cake image, and additional product details including vegan options.
description_view_3: The right side presents ingredients and step-by-step instructions for making chocolate sauce, along with an eco-pack symbol.
attribute_brand_logo: The Boneti brand logo is visible on the front and top of the box, featuring bold, uppercase white letters on a dark brown background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front and back panels display the word 'chocolate' and images of chocolate cake, clearly indicating a chocolate flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the left side panel, including a standard nutrition facts table and a barcode.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A circular badge on the front reads 'Solución Económica' in white on a brown background, indicating an economical solution.
